title: Track 1: Add error boundaries + fix console.error → log.error
description: Create error.tsx for (app) layout group to prevent white-screen crashes. Fix console.error in feature-request/route.ts:86 to use log.error().

title: Track 1: Migrate external API calls to resilientFetch
description: Wrap calendar, transit, weather, and feature-request external fetches with resilientFetch for retry logic and resilience.

title: Track 4: Implement HistoryList component + trip history actions
description: Create missing HistoryList component, add server actions for querying commute history, and add trip cancellation flow.

title: Track 3: Add dashboard-level recommendation fallback
description: Wrap recommendation display with try-catch so dashboard doesn't white-screen if rec engine fails. Show graceful degradation.

title: Track 2: Extend onboarding for V3 profile fields
description: Add riskTolerance, reliabilityPref to onboarding flow. homeArea and officeArea can be inferred from route selection.
